    • ImbueItem

      public static void ImbueItem(org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack item, org.bukkit.entity.Player player, SoulTypes soulType, boolean selfimbue, @Nullable @Nullable org.bukkit.entity.Player imbueperson)
      Imbue an item with a soul.
      Parameters:
      item - Itemstack to imbue
      player - Player who's soul is being imbued.
      soulType - soultype to imbue
      selfimbue - if the soul is being imbued by the player itself

    • UnImbueItem

      public static void UnImbueItem(org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack item, int slot)
      Unimbue player item
      Parameters:
      item - Itemstack to unimbue
      slot - slot within item to unimbue
